videos.title: Ferrari on Vineyard Road
videos.description: Cinematic push-in: red Ferrari 488 on Napa vineyard road at golden hour.

videos.title: McLaren at the Estate
videos.description: Aerials of orange McLaren P1 parked at luxury estate with pool in background.

videos.title: Lamborghini Huracán — Wine Barrels
videos.description: Low-angle pan across yellow Huracán with wine barrels and vineyard behind.

videos.title: Exotic Car Convoy
videos.description: Four-car lineup: Ferrari, McLaren, Lamborghini, Rolls-Royce shot from drone.

videos.title: Rolls-Royce Ghost at Winery
videos.description: Slow tracking shot of white Rolls-Royce parked outside luxury winery at sunset.

videos.title: Silverado at the Ranch
videos.description: Silverado pickup driving through ranch property with oak trees and rolling hills.
